summary.name: NETRA Evidence Lab
summary.flow: Validate file -> calculate SHA-256 -> extract supported text/metadata -> optional server hash recheck/storage -> retrieve synthetic case fields -> human review -> capability-gated report
summary.disclaimer: Only actual file metadata and parser output may be displayed. Optional Catalyst services remain unavailable until a live canary succeeds.

evidenceProfiles.label: Document intake
evidenceProfiles.kind: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, or JSON
limitations: PDF parsing is limited to 50 pages.
XLSX parsing reads the first worksheet.

evidenceProfiles.label: Image intake
limitations: No OCR, face identity, object recognition, or plate reading is inferred without a verified server capability.

workflowEvents.name: File validation
workflowEvents.detail: Checks the supported extension, non-empty content, and 10 MB limit.

workflowEvents.name: Provenance calculation
workflowEvents.detail: Calculates SHA-256 over the actual selected file bytes.

workflowEvents.name: Local extraction
workflowEvents.detail: Extracts supported text or image dimensions and preserves parser limitations.

workflowEvents.name: Grounded case retrieval
workflowEvents.detail: Matches extracted terms only against source fields in the active synthetic data version.

workflowEvents.name: Server persistence and enrichment canary
workflowEvents.detail: The implemented upload path validates decoded bytes, enforces 10 MB, recalculates SHA-256, and calls Stratus/File Store. Storage, OCR, orchestration, and server PDF output activate only after their verified live calls.

workflowEvents.name: Human review
workflowEvents.detail: No extracted fact, case link, or report becomes actionable without source review.

ragCorpus.title: Synthetic FIR fields
ragCorpus.detail: Case summary, modus operandi, station, time, vehicle, phone hash, and masked entity identifiers.

ragCorpus.title: Advisory BNS support mapping
ragCorpus.detail: Supports human legal review and does not produce a legal conclusion.

ragCorpus.title: Investigation safeguards
ragCorpus.detail: Requires source traceability, synthetic identifiers, privacy minimization, and human approval.
